name: cc-tools
description: cc-tools — the primitives layer of the cc-* harness: philosophy-agnostic skills you reach for while working, usable in any project or by any layer, invokable by the model or by you directly. /slap resets a fix stuck in a rabbit hole; /likec4 draws structured C4 architecture-as-code; /reminder pins one rule file (repo or global) as a hard constraint for the coming steps. Plus cctreectl, a .gitignore-aware project-tree helper the pipeline's map-the-codebase stage uses. Skills only — no commands. Zero-config. The harness's own setup lives in cc-config; the product script in cc-pipeline; the worker in cc-worker; the fleet chief in cc-chief.
